item.name: Executioner
item.description:
Goes out of its way to make life as difficult as possible for those who enter its territory, including sawing holes in hulls and tearing through nets.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Rumor has it that one member of this particular species once carved a large hole in the hull of a pirate ship, and thereby drowning all on board. Fishers often go to great lengths to hunt these wavekin, not for their meat, but to stop them before they can cause significant damage.
